theater_description: Cuadra 2 of Calle Tarata in Miraflores, Lima, and the immediately affected residential/commercial buildings.
geometry_method_note: The event is confined to the direct blast footprint of the Tarata car bomb.
military_area_note: No defensible military-exposure denominator exists because the attack targeted a civilian urban site rather than a combat theater with co-present forces.
civilian_area_note: The source base documents casualties well but does not give a stable count of all civilians present in the direct blast footprint.
split_reason: A single attack row captures the high-quality casualty evidence without diluting it with Lima-wide or campaign-wide violence.
quality_note: Direct civilian deaths and injuries are strong; only fallback metrics are supportable because there is no military denominator.
